< Home >

Itslearning.RestApi.Entities.TaskStatusFilter

Defines the filtering tasks by status.

Possible enumeration values:

NameValueDescription
Active

0

Return active tasks.
Completed

1

Return completed tasks.
Hidden

2

Return hidden tasks.
All

10

Return all tasks.
ActiveViewAsInCourse

20

Return active tasks for view as in course.
CompletedViewAsInCourse

21

Return completed tasks for view as in course.
